center.name: 大西洋沿岸森林
center.summary: 大西洋沿岸森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联52种鸟类，包括斑拟䳍、孤䳍、黑額鳴冠雉等52种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Alagoas tyrannulet is found only in far northeastern Brazil, in eastern Pernambuco and northeastern Alagoas states. Its total range is estimated at , within which it is known from about 20 locations. It is a bird of the Atlantic Forest, where it inhabits remnants of primary evergreen forest and mature secondary forest. One author states its elevational range as between but others have extended it to between Roda, S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a bird of the Atlantic Forest biome, where it inhabits humid montane forest at elevations between

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Ecuador they were almost exclusively recorded in the humid forest of the North-East, they were also found in the Atlantic, igapò, and terra-firme forests of Brazil, Araucaria forests, and man-made or disturbed habitats, such as clearings, agricultural land and suburban areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Atlantic Forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in humid Atlantic Forest in far northeastern Argentina (Misiones), eastern and southeastern Brazil, and far eastern Paraguay

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |date=29 September 2014 |website=Scientific American |access-date=30 September 2014 |archive-date=6 October 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20141006070241/http://blogs.scientificamerican.com/extinction-countdown/2014/09/29/deforestation-new-bird-brazil/ |url-status=live }} in mountainous parts of the Atlantic Forest in southern Bahia, Brazil, having been found in the municipalities of Arataca, Boa Nova, and Iguaí

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate is found somewhat more nearly continuously from Espírito Santo south to Paraná. There are also scattered records outside these core ranges. It is a bird of the Atlantic Forest, where it inhabits primary and secondary forest, cocoa plantations with a forest overcover, and clearings with some trees. "There is some evidence that the species may be associated with a single species of tall, fine-leafed leguminous tree, which is widespread and locally common, and often supports the clumps of mistletoe on which it primarily feeds." In elevation it is almost always found below

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a bird of the Atlantic Forest, inhabiting humid primary and secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in tropical humid forests in South America, where its range includes the Amazon, the Guiana Shield, Trinidad, and the Atlantic Forest in eastern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a bird of the Atlantic Forest, inhabiting the interior and edges of humid forest both primary and secondary

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is a bird of the Atlantic Forest, where it inhabits humid restinga broadleaf and evergreen forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The helmeted woodpecker is mostly found in large tracts of Atlantic Forest, both semi-deciduous and mixed deciduous-coniferous

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its typical habitat is lowland evergreen Atlantic forest and Araucaria forest, but it also occurs in gallery forest, bamboo thickets, scrubland, and wooded savannah

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits a variety of landscapes within the Caatinga and Atlantic Forest ecoregions, from rather dry open forests in the north to dense humid ones in the south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Amazon and Atlantic Forest of South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Within the Atlantic Forest biome it primarily inhabits humid lowland and montane evergreen forest and secondary forest but is also found near small marshes, along watercourses in woodlands, and in Eucalyptus plantations and urban areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies mentalis is mostly found in humid Atlantic Forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the Atlantic Forest biome, where it occurs in secondary forest, cultivated land with groves of trees, plantations, and urban parks. It is common in cities "including the huge metropolises of Rio de Janeiro and São Paulo". Towards the higher elevations inland it also is found in the edges and canopy of montane rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a bird of the Atlantic Forest, where it inhabits the understory of evergreen forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The purple-winged ground dove (Paraclaravis geoffroyi) is a critically endangered species of dove, native to the Atlantic forest, mainly near bamboo, in south-eastern Brazil, far eastern Paraguay, and northern-eastern Argentina (Misiones only)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: scutatus can be found in the Atlantic Forest in SE Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the east it inhabits the tropical evergreen Atlantic Forest biome

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ruby-crowned tanager (Tachyphonus coronatus) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae found in the southern areas of Brazil and the Atlantic Forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It primarily inhabits the interior of humid evergreen Atlantic Forest, less often its edges, and locally in restinga woodlands on white-sand soils

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a bird of the Atlantic Forest, where it primarily inhabits the undergrowth of humid primary forest and mature secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: squamatus inhabits humid Atlantic Forest, especially montane evergreen forest and low elevation rainforest but also gallery forest at the western edge of its range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The scalloped woodcreeper is found from northeastern São Paulo state in southern Brazil south to Alto Paraná Department in southeastern Paraguay, Misiones and Corrientes provinces in northeastern Argentina, and extreme northeastern Uruguay. It inhabits humid Atlantic Forest and drier forest in the planalto

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of silky-tailed nightjar is found in the Atlantic Forest region of southeastern Brazil, eastern Paraguay, and extreme northeastern Argentina (Misiones Province)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits a wide variety of landscapes in the Atlantic Forest biome, where it tends to stay low in dense undergrowth

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits moist lowland forest, especially in areas characterized by dense understory and thick leaf litter. Due to the ongoing destruction of the Atlantic Forest, one of the world’s most critically endangered biodiversity hotspots, the Stresemann's bristlefront faces an extreme risk of extinction

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: brasiliensis is found in the Atlantic Forest of southeastern Brazil approximately from Rio Grande do Norte south to Espírito Santo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in highland Atlantic Forest in southeastern Brazil, far northeastern Argentina (only Misiones Province), and perhaps far eastern Paraguay. Unlike most other saltators, it is sexually dichromatic: Females resemble a green-winged saltator, but with a thicker bill, greener face and buff throat

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Endemic to southeastern Brazil, the three-toed jacamar is found in drier parts of the Atlantic Forest. It is now restricted to the states of Rio de Janeiro (primarily in the Paraíba do Sul valley) and eastern Minas Gerais, though populations also formerly existed in the states of Espírito Santo, São Paulo and Paraná

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: hypostictus both in habitat preference and morphology, and is found in the narrow coastal belt of Atlantic moist forests in eastern Brazil from near Salvador da Bahia in north to Espírito Santo in south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It was formerly treated as being conspecific with the white-bellied tanager which is found in the Atlantic Forest of eastern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the southern Atlantic Forest of Brazil, Paraguay and far northeastern Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It mostly inhabits dense primary Atlantic Forest but has been recorded in secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is primarily a bird of the humid Atlantic Forest and also occurs in semi-deciduous forest and in gallery forest in cerrado

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits lowlands and hills of the Atlantic Forest, both primary and secondary, and is also found in parks

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is native to Atlantic forest of eastern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in eastern and southern Brazil (excluding the Mata Atlântica and planalto uplands along the coast), Paraguay, Uruguay, and Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The core of its habitat is the Atlantic Forest but it also occurs in the transition zone between cerrado and caatinga biomes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cearensis is a bird of the Atlantic Forest where it occurs in vine-rich patches of humid and semi-humid forest up to about

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the canopy of the lowland Atlantic forest, and has a diet of seeds, berries, especially from Byrsonima sericea and ficuses, fruit, caterpillars, and other insects

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The saffron toucanet (Pteroglossus bailloni) is a species of bird in the family Ramphastidae found in the Atlantic Forest in far north-eastern Argentina, south-eastern Brazil, and eastern Paraguay

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It primarily inhabits the Atlantic forest though it has been spotted over mangroves

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits a wide variety of landscapes within the Atlantic Forest biome but seems to concentrate in mixed forest with large amounts of paraná pine (Araucaria angustifolia)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the understory of the humid coastal Atlantic Forest up to an elevation of

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the understory of a variety of landscapes within the Atlantic Forest biome including lowland and montane rainforest, semi-deciduous forest, and mature secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits several types of Atlantic Forest including evergreen, gallery, and coastal

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |last4=Cracraft |first4=Joel |date=October 2009 |title=Phylogeny and phylogenetic classification of the tyrant flycatchers, cotingas, manakins, and their allies (Aves: Tyrannides) |url=https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/j.1096-0031.2009.00254.x |journal=Cladistics |language=en |volume=25 |issue=5 |pages=429–467 |doi=10.1111/j.1096-0031.2009.00254.x |issn=0748-3007|url-access=subscription }} It is found in the Atlantic Forest, especially in regions where Araucaria angustifolia are found, in the highlands of southeastern Brazil and northeastern Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a bird of the Atlantic Forest where it is found in old-growth and secondary forest, selectively logged and remnant forest, palm groves, and gallery forest at the edges of the cerrado
